testCases.title: Verify navigation to the Sandbox page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/pages/'

testCases.title: Verify navigation to the Lessons page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/lessons/'

testCases.title: Verify navigation to the FAQ page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/faq/'

testCases.title: Verify navigation to the Login page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/login/'

testCases.title: Verify navigation to the Spoofing Headers page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/pages/advanced/?gotcha=headers'

testCases.title: Verify navigation to the Logins & Session Data page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/pages/advanced/?gotcha=login'
expected: Logins & Session Data page loads successfully

testCases.title: Verify navigation to the CSRF & Hidden Values page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/pages/advanced/?gotcha=csrf'
expected: CSRF & Hidden Values page loads successfully

testCases.title: Verify email input field accepts valid email format
steps: Verification: Expect the value of locator `page.locator('#email')` to be 'test@example.com'
expected: Email field accepts input and retains the value

testCases.title: Verify email input field accepts special characters in email
steps: Verification: Expect the value of locator `page.locator('#email')` to be 'test!#$%&'*+-/=?^_`{|}~@example.com'
expected: Email field accepts input and retains the value
